name: full_analysis
doc: Run the unified XPS analysis pipeline with automatic triage and routing. Includes: 1) Triage (detect standard spectra vs map data), 2) Quality gate (validate data integrity), 3) Auto-route to appropriate workflow (standard: reader→fitter→quantifier→plotter OR map: mapper→plotter). Handles mixed datasets automatically.

name: tool_real_xps_workflow
doc: Production workflow with unified triage/quality system. Auto-detects file types (.spe/.vgd/.csv) and routes to correct workflow. Standard: reader→fitter→quantifier→plotter. Map: mapper→plotter. Mixed datasets: runs both workflows sequentially.

name: tool_xps_workflow_runner
doc: High-level helper that inventories project data, ensures dependencies, and runs appropriate steps.

name: tool_xps_reader
doc: Convert raw instrument files into standardized CSV files.

name: tool_xps_fitter
doc: Run the XPS peak fitting pipeline on prepared CSV files.

name: tool_xps_quantifier
doc: Quantify elemental composition from fitted peak results.

name: tool_xps_plotter
doc: Generate plots and visualizations from raw/fitted data.

name: tool_xps_correlator
doc: Run the ML correlator to relate quantified data to metadata.

name: tool_create_groups
doc: Natural-language grouping helper (smart_define_groups) for organizing sample files before running workflows.

name: tool_workflow_orchestrator
doc: Pre-flight triage and quality validation using LangGraph architecture. Inspects XPS files to determine: 1) Data type (standard spectra, 2D map, hyperspectral map), 2) Quality metrics (SNR, resolution, integrity), 3) Routing decision (standard_workflow vs map_workflow). Returns success/failure with routing recommendation.

name: tool_xps_triage
doc: Lightweight file inspection to detect XPS data types. Supports: .spe/.vgd/.npl (binary formats), .xy/.txt/.asc (text formats), .csv (map data with spatial parameters), .vms/.vamas (VAMAS format). Returns data_type, confidence, and recommended_processor.

name: tool_quality_gatekeeper
doc: Hierarchical quality validation for XPS data. Level 1: Universal checks (empty data, energy axis, SNR). Level 2: Modality-specific checks (spectrum: resolution/peak quality, map: spatial/dead pixels). Returns QualityReport with pass/fail decision and detailed issues.

name: tool_xps_mapper
doc: Process hyperspectral XPS map data. Workflow: 1) Import map CSV, 2) PCA clustering for phase identification, 3) MCR (Multivariate Curve Resolution) for component extraction, 4) Generate spatial maps and component plots. Use for 2D/3D XPS mapping data.
